introSection: Feuerdache (German for Fire Dragon) is a steel roller coaster located at Legoland Deutschland in Günzburg, Bavaria, Germany.

sections.title: Incident
sections.content: On August 11, 2022, a rear-end collision occurred when the second train was dispatched into the station while the first train was still present due to an unexpected stop. The impact injured 31 guests, one seriously, with most suffering only minor injuries. Investigations found that two technicians had deliberately bypassed a safety block sensor to release the second train. The ride was closed for several weeks after the accident, and the responsible employees faced penalty orders.

fullText:
Feuerdache (German for Fire Dragon) is a steel roller coaster located at Legoland Deutschland in Günzburg, Bavaria, Germany.





On August 11, 2022, a rear-end collision occurred when the second train was dispatched into the station while the first train was still present due to an unexpected stop. The impact injured 31 guests, one seriously, with most suffering only minor injuries. Investigations found that two technicians had deliberately bypassed a safety block sensor to release the second train. The ride was closed for several weeks after the accident, and the responsible employees faced penalty orders.
